query:
ALTER TABLE personas 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS yearsExperience INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS primaryCity VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS primaryState VARCHAR(100) NULL;
